name: acb_hot_fourier_3bet_biglotto
hypothesis: ACB+hot_50+fourier_500 3注組合可取代 Triple Strike 成為大樂透最佳3注策略

S1_ACB_single.verdict: FAIL — 150期負值，違反三窗口全正標準

mcnemar_vs_triple_strike.verdict: NOT SIGNIFICANT — 差距8期，p=0.545，統計等效

reason: McNemar p=0.545 遠超0.05，無法確認優於現有 Triple Strike (L04: McNemar不顯著不採納)
notable_finding: ACB獨有命中71期 vs TS獨有63期，兩策略信號來源不同，低重疊(b+c=134/1451=9.2%)
future_condition: 可作為4注組合第4注候選 — ACB與TS低重疊代表互補性高，需回測 TS3+ACB 4注系統

components.ACB_window30: AdaptiveACB(BIG_LOTTO, window=30): freq_deficit×0.4 + gap_score×0.6 + boundary/mod bonus
